# icon

**Instance Property**

The URL to an image on disk that depicts the motion activity.

## Declaration

```swift
var icon: URL?
```

## Accessing motion summary information

- **date**: The range of time in which the motion activity takes place.

items.description: The range of time in which the motion activity takes place.
items.name: date
